0.q: The increased drought and salt tolerance in the transgenic plants is associated with ABA-induced production of H2O2 via NADPH oxidase and NO via NOS-like, which sequentially induce transcripts and activities of SOD, CAT, APX and GR.

1.q: Over-expression of the 9-cis-epoxycarotenoid dioxygenase gene (SgNCED1) in the transgenic tobaccos increased ABA content and tolerance to drought and salt stresses.

2.q: Over-expression of the 9-cis-epoxycarotenoid dioxygenase gene (SgNCED1) in the transgenic tobaccos increased ABA content

3.q: the oxidative cleavage of cis-epoxycarotenoids by NCED is the key regulatory step of ABA biosynthesis in higher plants
